title: Travel Budget Calculator
summary: Estimate trip costs by person and day, export a planning worksheet, and bridge to a paid Trip Budget Sheet.
selection_rule: Use this when the task is exact trip budget calculation with reusable planner output, not a one-off article.

entries.title: Travel Budget Calculator (DayOneBuilder)
entries.first_action: Open the calculator, enter travel inputs, and click Calculate trip budget.
entries.smoke_test: Enter sample values and verify total budget output appears and CSV can be downloaded.
entries.proof_signal: CSV export, copyable summary, and analytics events for completion/export/save/purchase intent.
entries.fallback: If this calculator does not fit the currency or planning constraints, review budget templates linked from CFPB/Jotform references.

install_or_call_path: Open https://dayonebuilder.online/travel-budget-calculator/ and click Calculate trip budget, or download module-manifest.json from the page.
